story_arceus_09_03000/2401_1001_0100_10:
Which path should you take? I see your
doubts and worries.
story_arceus_09_03000/2401_1001_0200_10:
Give me your hand, please, for you to know
your own fate.
story_arceus_09_03000/2401_1001_0300_10:
I heard your fortune-telling involves putting
one’s hand through that bracelet.
story_arceus_09_03000/2401_1001_0400_10: Are you going to read my fortune?
story_arceus_09_03000/2401_1001_0700_10:
I can’t believe someone who uses Psychic
types like Sabrina is helping me out!
story_arceus_09_03000/2401_1001_1000_10:
A strong shining light,
once separated, shall be
your guide to follow.
story_arceus_09_03000/2401_1001_1100_10: A strong shining light? What could that be?
story_arceus_09_03000/2401_1001_1600_10: It’s the Lucario I entrusted to Serena!
